message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 40
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #DDDDDD
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  BoxBorderColor #666666
  BoxBackgroundColor #D9D9D9
  ArrowColor #333333
  MessageAlign left
}

actor Player as P

box "Portal Service" #D9D9D9
participant "Telnet Server" as TS
participant "Connection Manager" as CM
participant "Middleware" as MW
end box

participant "World Service" as WS

P -> TS : 1. connects to server
TS -> CM : 2. passes connection to manager

activate CM
CM -> CM : 3. calls configured OnConnect callbacks
CM -> MW : 4. calls all Middleware OnConnect callbacks
CM -> CM : 5. start main Connection loop
CM -> WS : 6. initialize World session
deactivate CM

@enduml
